end return(function(l,W,a,f,V,C,u,w,G,F,k,P,R,o,D,j,r,s,m,B,p)P,k,m,p,o,r,F,j,R,s,D,w,G,B=function(l,h)local W=r(h)local a=function(...)return D(l,{...},h,W)end return a end,function(l,h)local
